caption: Done with clinic. What are you doing for the 4th? Leo wants to grill but I'm not committing without knowing your plans first.
Was literally about to text you. We're doing rooftop at that place on Main — come. Bring Leo.
He'll say yes before I finish the sentence. What time? I'm on call until noon Saturday.
6pm. Plenty of time for you to recover from whatever Ashwaubenon threw at you this week 😂
